name: codex-hud
description: Claude-HUD-style native Codex CLI footer preset

interface.shortDescription: Clean context, usage, mode, git, and model footer for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex HUD configures Codex's native TUI status line and terminal title to show a Claude-HUD-style at-a-glance view: model, context usage, usage limits, permission mode, approval mode, git branch/change state, current worktree, tokens, and task progress.
